SL_Works_Section.description: Locate the 'SL Works' sub-heading under the Method of Supply Requirement section. Identify specific tasks such as 'Remove SL' and 'Install new SL'.

SL_Material_Funding.description: Customer Funded Contestable Works: All other works required.

Substation Works.description: Substation commissioning categorized as Customer Funded Non-Contestable Work

Substation Commissioning Responsibilitie.description: Substation commissioning is a Customer Funded Non-Contestable Work

LandInterestGuidelines.description: No specific mention of 'Land Interests' section or checkbox for 'NA' in the provided sections.

RequiredEasements.description: No details regarding required easements for new HV/LV lines or substation sites found in the provided sections.

PropertyAccessConditions.description: No specific conditions regarding access to private property or creation of right-of-ways for Endeavour Energy assets found in the provided sections.

Mandatory Transaction References.description: Unique alphanumeric reference code ARP4983A2 must be quoted in the EFT transaction field.

Document Remittance and Restriction Requ.description: Email remittance copies to remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au. Credit cards and cheques are not accepted.

Invoice Policy.description: A formal Tax Invoice will be provided following the receipt of payment.

LV Works.description: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive.
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive.

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules.
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005.
